Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 81 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. William Blake, Remote by the Sea 71 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 95 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 74 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Agents of Chaos 90 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 281 upvotes, 56 comments
  7. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 36 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 246 upvotes, 69 comments
  10. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 25 upvotes, 3 comments
  11. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 497 upvotes, 156 comments
  12. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. Semantic – Reducing LLM "Agent Loops" by 27.78% via AST Logic Graphs 20 upvotes, 2 comments
  14. How to turn anything into a router 631 upvotes, 218 comments
  15. Do your own writing 437 upvotes, 152 comments
  16. Safeguarding cryptocurrency by disclosing quantum vulnerabilities responsibly 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 195 upvotes, 72 comments
  18. Recover Apple Keychain 74 upvotes, 23 comments
  19. Seeing Like a Spreadsheet 93 upvotes, 33 comments
  20. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 249 upvotes, 111 comments
  21. Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading 209 upvotes, 97 comments
  22. Show HN: Coasts – Containerized Hosts for Agents 73 upvotes, 28 comments
  23. Artemis II is not safe to fly 117 upvotes, 52 comments
  24. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 39 upvotes, 13 comments
  25. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 359 upvotes, 189 comments
  26. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Principles and Gear 16 upvotes, 4 comments
  28. Bird brains (2023) 305 upvotes, 194 comments
  29. Android Developer Verification 189 upvotes, 170 comments
  30. R3 Bio pitched “brainless clones” to serve the role of backup human bodies 45 upvotes, 53 comments

Last generated 1:00pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
